It belongs to the genus Hemionitis, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential to reduce oxidative stress and promote immune system function.
